case_title: JD McReynolds, INC. VS. WRC HUNTINGTON, LLC, INDIVIDUALLY ET AL

docket_entries.description: LAW & MOTION, DEPT. 302, AS TO THE NOV-10-2022 HEARING RE: GLEN L. KULIK'S MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD AS TO DEFENDANT WRC HUNTINGTON, LLC DBA HUNTINGTON HOTEL, THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. GLEN KULIK'S UNOPPOSED "MOTION TO BE RELIEVED AS COUNSEL" IS GRANTED. COUNSEL FOR THE PREVAILING PARTY IS REQUIRED TO PREPARE A PROPOSED JUDICIAL COUNCIL ORDER WHICH STATES THAT THE MOTION WAS NOT OPPOSED. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER JR.; CLERK: SEAN KANE; NOT REPORTED. (302/RBU)

MASTER CALENDAR ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE ISSUED TO WRC HUNTINGTON, LLC DBA HUNTINGTON HOTEL SET ON FEB-27-2023 CONTINUED TO MAR-13-2023 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT. 206. NO APPEARANCE BY OR FOR WRC HUNTINGTON, LLC DBA HUNTINGTON HOTEL. THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS FOR FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH THE COURT'S ORDER PURSUANT TO THE NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL AND TRIAL ORDER, PAY OUTSTANDING SANCTIONS, AND FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT TODAY'S OSC HEARING. FURTHER SANCTION IN THE AMOUNT OF $40.00 IS IMPOSED. TOTAL AMOUNT OF SANCTIONS IS $300.00, PAYABLE BY MAR-10-2023. THIS ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE WILL BE DISCHARGED AND TAKEN OFF CALENDAR IF SANCTIONS IN THE TOTAL AMOUNT OF $300.00 ARE PAID PRIOR TO THE HEARING DATE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT. calendar.matters:
COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Mar-15-2023 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar being set for motion for entry of default court judgment.

Dept. 505; Judge: Michelle Tong; Clerk: R. Sahatjian. Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 10:32:23 a.m. and concluding at 10:34:36 a.m.

Atty Robert N. Weaver, Esq., appearing via for Plaintiff Corporate Security Service, Inc. represented by Judy McReynolds, also appearing via Zoom.

Defendant WRC Huntington LLC dba Huntington Hotel not appearing.

Ms. Judy McReynolds is placed under oath and testifies.

Court has reviewed all moving papers.

The Plaintiff orally request to change the name of the Plaintiff from Corporate Security Services, Inc. JD McReynolds, Inc. as stated on the Dec-22-2022 filing of notice of name change. The Court grants that request.

The Plaintiff orally requests to Dismiss Does 1-10. The Court grants that request.

After review, consideration, examination of witness, and good cause appearing, the Court RULES in favor of Plaintiff JD McReynolds, Inc., and against Defendant WRC Huntington LLC dba Huntington Hotel, as follows:

Damages: $176,529.92
Prejudgment Interest: $10,591.87
Costs: $638.00

TOTAL JUDGMENT: $187,759.79

Proposed judgment signed and filed after hearing. (D505)

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Nov-10-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. GLEN L. KULIK, Esq. of Kulik Gottesman Siegel & Ware LLP (Tel: 310-557-9200) as movant;
No other appearances made in this matter.

HEARING RE: GLEN L. KULIK'S MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD AS TO DEFENDANT WRC HUNTINGTON, LLC DBA HUNTINGTON HOTEL.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Glen Kulik's unopposed "motion to be relieved as counsel" is granted.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed judicial council order which states that the motion was not opposed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/RBU)
